idea-plugin.name: Umber
idea-plugin.description:
Umber — A Warm Theme Family

Four carefully crafted variants built around warm, earthy tones and muted syntax highlighting.

Variants

  • Espresso — Rich brown dark theme (#302b26)
  • Charcoal — Warm grey dark theme (#2d2a27)
  • Olive — Forest green dark theme (#263020)
  • Light — Warm beige light theme (#f5f0e8) with background-highlight syntax

Design

  • Muted keywords that don't compete with your code
  • Soft accent color (#6699CC) for functions and links
  • Warm, low-fatigue backgrounds across all UI surfaces
  • Light variant uses background highlighting instead of text color for syntax

Accessibility

  • WCAG AA contrast (4.5:1) on all syntax tokens
  • Colorblind-safe palette — blue vs warm/amber axis, no red-vs-green reliance
  • Errors indicated by underlines, not color alone

Tuned for TypeScript and Go, with solid defaults for JSON, YAML, CSS, HTML, and Markdown.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Initial release with four variants: Espresso, Charcoal, Olive, Light
  • Full UI theming — editor, sidebar, tabs, tool windows, status bar, popups, buttons, inputs, scrollbars
  • Complete syntax highlighting with WCAG AA contrast compliance
  • Language-specific tuning for TypeScript and Go
  • Diff viewer, terminal ANSI colors, and VCS annotation colors
